heroHeadline: BREAKING — Planet Labs Blacks Out Iran Theater Satellite Imagery, Cutting Independent Verification
heroSubtitle: US commercial satellite firm Planet Labs imposed a blackout on war-zone imagery covering the Iran conflict area on Apr 5, restricting public and media access to satellite photos. The move limits independent verification of strike damage and civilian infrastructure destruction as the conflict enters Day 37.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-05. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post.
